Off Calendar Jun-16-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward G. Poole for Eve Niquette (petitioner) (via zoom).

The Court acknowledged that disclaimer was filed within a reasonable time. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Poole appeared via zoom for Eve Niqutte (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. Eve Niquette is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $700,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA

Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Continued To Oct-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 27, 1981 is admitted to probate. Charles F. Pohl is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simmons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Quintalla. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
